title: genista hirsuta subsp. hirsuta
intro: Genista hirsuta subsp. hirsuta, commonly known as hairy broom or hairy genistal, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It is a shrub that produces yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain types of cancer. Genista hirsuta subsp. hirsuta can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported health benefits.
